cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out which statement is sarcastic. The options are A and B. The first part of both is the same: "You're welcome my dear friend. Always glad to feed the..." Then they diverge. Option A says "elephants, that woefully endangered species," and B says "trolls, that woefully endangered species." Hmm, so the key here is understanding the context.
